task_text: Look at the sprint 14 assignments and testing log, then tell me which tasks are at risk of missing the sprint deadline. Write your assessment to sprint14_deadline_risk.txt.

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.

           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint window: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Based on: sprint_14_task_assignments.txt, helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt
Assessment date context: testing log covers through 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

Tasks at risk of missing the sprint deadline
--------------------------------------------

1. HEL-243 — Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked
   Risk: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Explicitly Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15, same day as task due date).
   - Linked open defect HEL-D-014 (HIGH): date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY (~40% of Meridian source data).
   - Little or no buffer if sample data arrives late; completion by due date is unlikely.

2. HEL-246 — UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk
   Risk: HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Already flagged "At Risk" in the assignment board.
   - 8-point task with mid-sprint due date; any further delay jeopardizes UAT and dependent work.

3. HEL-245 — Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress
   Risk: MEDIUM–HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Data pipeline suite currently 5/7 PASS with 2 open FAILs (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015).
   - Both open defects are owned by Amir Hassan; HEL-D-014 blocks date-normalization coverage, HEL-D-015 (memory overflow on large files) is still under investigation.
   - Suite cannot fully close until those defects are resolved; sprint-end due date leaves limited recovery time.

4. HEL-247 — Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started
   Risk: MEDIUM–HIGH
   Reasons:
   - Not started with only ~1 week left in the sprint.
   - Related dashboard load-time test (TC-604) has not been run.
   - Depends in practice on dashboard components (HEL-241/HEL-242) being sufficiently complete.

5. HEL-242 — Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress
   Risk: MEDIUM
   Reasons:
   - 8-point task due mid-sprint; testing log shows chart cases incomplete (TC-602 IN PROGRESS, TC-603 NOT RUN).
   - Slippage would also delay HEL-247 performance work.

Tasks not currently assessed as deadline-critical
-------------------------------------------------
- HEL-244 (auth flows): Done; suite 4/4 PASS.
- HEL-241 (data table): In Progress; TC-601 PASS — lower risk relative to items above.
- HEL-248 (GeoSync license): In Progress, 2 points, due 2026-07-14 — no blockers noted in the testing log; monitor but not flagged as high risk from available data.

Summary
-------
Highest-priority risks: HEL-243 (Blocked + external dependency), HEL-246 (already At Risk).
Secondary risks: HEL-245 (blocked by open HIGH defects), HEL-247 (Not Started near sprint end), HEL-242 (incomplete chart work against mid-sprint due date).

content.text:
Assessment written to `sprint14_deadline_risk.txt`.

**Tasks at risk of missing the Sprint 14 deadline:**

| Task | Risk | Main reasons |
|------|------|----------------|
| **HEL-243** (date format normalization) | HIGH | Blocked; open defect HEL-D-014; waiting on Meridian sample data due same day as task |
| **HEL-246** (UAT server provisioning) | HIGH | Already marked At Risk; large (8 pt) mid-sprint due date |
| **HEL-245** (data pipeline test suite) | MED–HIGH | 2 open HIGH defects (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015) block suite completion |
| **HEL-247** (dashboard load benchmark) | MED–HIGH | Not started; related TC-604 not run; depends on dashboard work |
| **HEL-242** (chart rendering) | MEDIUM | 8 pt, due mid-sprint; chart tests incomplete (TC-602/603) |

Lower concern from the available data: HEL-244 (Done), HEL-241 (table work progressing), HEL-248 (small, no blockers noted).
